description: Test prompts for the diy-drawing skill. Each test has a user prompt and a rubric of what the skill should do.

tests.prompt: リビング用に3段のオープン棚を作りたい。幅60cm、奥行20cm、高さ90cmくらいで、SPF材で作りたい。
rubric: should use spec-template-shelf.json as a starting point
should set overall width=600, depth ~184 (single 1×8) or 235 (1×10), height=900
should generate spec.json that validates with 0 errors
should output plan.pdf with all 5 sections
BOM should show 2-3 boards of SPF 1×8 or 1×10
estimated cost should be in ¥2000-5000 range

tests.prompt: (T1完了後) 棚を3段から4段に増やしてほしい。高さは変えずに段を等間隔で。
rubric: should edit existing spec.json — NOT regenerate from scratch
should add one more shelf part with appropriate position
should recalculate shelf positions (4 shelves in 900mm height = ~280mm spacing)
validator should still pass
BOM should reflect 1 additional shelf piece (still fits in same number of boards)

tests.prompt: 壁面いっぱいに本棚を作りたい。幅3m、奥行15cm、高さ2.5m、棚板は1×4で。
rubric: validator MUST flag at least 2 issues:
- parts > 1820mm need longer stock (or warn user)
- tipping risk (height 2500mm, depth 150mm = ratio 16.7 >> 2.5)
- SPF 1×4 shelf with 3000mm unsupported span >> 600mm safe limit
skill should explain risks to user before generating renders
should suggest mitigations (wall anchoring, intermediate supports, thicker material)

tests.prompt: ガレージに置く頑丈な棚を作りたい。2×4でガッチリ作って、棚板4段。だいたい幅90cm、奥40cm、高さ180cm。
rubric: should use spec-template-rack.json as starting point
should validate (overall H/D ratio 4.5 will trigger tipping warning, which is expected)
BOM should show 2×4 lumber + plywood shelf panels
PDF should display 4 shelves correctly in 3D preview
cost estimate should be ¥6000-12000
should ask at most 3 clarifying questions in a single batch (sizes, material, location/use)
should provide defaults so user can say 'それで進めて'
should NOT immediately generate a spec without any input
